name: plivo

metadata.name: plivo
classifiers: Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules
metadata.summary: A Python SDK to make voice calls & send SMS using Plivo and to generate Plivo XML

documentation:
The Plivo Python SDK makes it simpler to integrate communications into your
Python applications using the Plivo REST API. Using the SDK, you will be able
to make voice calls, send SMS and generate Plivo XML to control your call flows.

See https://github.com/plivo/plivo-python for more information.

modules.name: plivo.base
documentation: Base classes, used to deal with every Plivo resource.

classes.name: plivo.base.PlivoGenericResponse
documentation:
A generic response to cover it all!

This provides a generic blanket response based on what is received from
Plivo servers.

This will be used only during POST and DELETE requests.

classes.name: plivo.base.PlivoResource

methods.name: plivo.base.PlivoResource.__init__
documentation: Sets up the resource URI along with a hack for Account resource

The Plivo resource object

This provides an interface to deal with all Plivo resources and
sub-resources

classes.name: plivo.base.SecondaryPlivoResource
documentation:
SecondaryPlivoResource resource object
This provides an interface to deal with resources where identifier is has a mid level parent

functions.name: plivo.utils.validate_signature
documentation:
Validates requests made by Plivo to your servers.

```
param uri

Your server URL

param nonce

X-Plivo-Signature-V2-Nonce

param signature

X-Plivo-Signature-V2 header

param auth_token

Plivo Auth token

return

True if the request matches signature, False otherwise
```

functions.name: plivo.utils.signature_v3.validate_v3_signature
documentation:
Validates V3 Signature received from Plivo to your server

```
param method

Your callback method

param uri

Your callback URL

param params

Params received in callback from Plivo

param nonce

X-Plivo-Signature-V3-Nonce header

param v3_signature

X-Plivo-Signature-V3 header

param auth_token

(Sub)Account auth token

return

True if the request matches signature, False otherwise
```
